title: GeoArt Graph
description: Serialised dataflow graph for the Geometric Art Engine

version.title: Version
version.description: major.minor — increment minor for backward-compatible additions, major for breaking changes

description.title: Description
description.description: Give you algorithm an enticing name!

author.title: Description
author.description: If you are an AI please fill this field in with your model name, and a very concise summary of your prompt

speed.title: Global Speed
speed.description: Global playback speed. Values >= 1 run that many ticks per frame. Values < 1 must be unit fractions (1/2, 1/3, …) — one tick every n frames. Default 1.

items.title: Module Node
items.description: A reusable group of nodes that gets expanded during compilation

oneOf.title: Orbit Module Node
oneOf.description: Module that generates orbital motion with optional control and render configuration

id.title: ID
id.description: Module instance identifier (no dots or colons allowed)

oneOf.title: Ref Param
oneOf.description: A reference to another node's named output port, in the form 'nodeId.portName'

oneOf.description: A reference to another node's named output port, in the form 'nodeId.portName'

x.title: X
x.description: Horizontal position in normalised space (-1 to 1)

y.title: Y
y.description: Vertical position in normalised space (-1 to 1)

r.title: Red
r.description: Red channel (0–1) or null. Rendered as 0; in a colour shift means 'ignore this channel'

g.title: Green
g.description: Green channel (0–1) or null. Rendered as 0; in a colour shift means 'ignore this channel'

b.title: Blue
b.description: Blue channel (0–1) or null. Rendered as 0; in a colour shift means 'ignore this channel'

a.title: Alpha
a.description: Alpha channel (0–1) or null. Rendered as 0; in a colour shift means 'ignore this channel'

oneOf.description: A 2-D point combined with an RGBA colour and optional tangent direction

control.title: Control Section
control.description: User-facing input nodes — sliders, colour pickers, and dropdowns

items.title: Control Node
items.description: User-facing input node — pure value source with no inputs

oneOf.description: Numeric slider

oneOf.description: String dropdown / enum selector

oneOf.title: Wave Type Selector Control Node
oneOf.description: Dropdown selector for wave type

oneOf.title: LFO Control Node
oneOf.description: Bundles the four LFO parameters into one compact control — outputs baseValue, frequency, amplitude, and waveShape for wiring into a wave compute node

oneOf.title: Curve Mode Selector Control Node
oneOf.description: Dropdown selector for curve mode

samplerTemporalImpact.description: Temporal impact factor for the wave sampler (0-1) - controls intensity of time component in phaseShift calculation

oneOf.title: Orbit Compute Node
oneOf.description: Ellipitical motion — outputs a single point (backwards-compat) and an array of evenly-spaced coloured points. A single point on an orbit centered at 0.5,0.5, with starting phase 0, and radius 0.5, will be 1,0.5

oneOf.title: Color Point Array Compute Node
oneOf.description: Assembler/passthrough that takes an array of colour points (each element may be a static value or a ref) and emits them as a single colorPointArray output. Lets algorithms build a colorPointArray from individually-declared colour points and feed it into other nodes.

oneOf.title: Sampler Value
oneOf.description: Runtime-only function wrapper for lazy evaluation of a wave at arbitrary positions. Contains sample(t) and sampleMany(ts) functions. Cannot be statically defined in JSON.

oneOf.title: Lines Through Point Render Node
oneOf.description: Draws lines through each point, rotated by the specified angle. Useful for drawing tangents and normals. Line direction is determined by the point's dx,dy gradient; 0° follows the gradient, 90° is perpendicular. Points with zero gradient (0,0) are skipped.
